reopened_reason: User rejected 2026-04-12 COMPLETE verdict after live walkthrough surfaced 7 defects. Re-executed against v2 plan with Phases A-H completed 2026-04-13.

notes: Verdict is NEEDS_HUMAN (not COMPLETE) because two pre-existing repo-wide issues gate the full-repo TypeScript/Lint/Build runs: (a) apps/web/src/app/leads/[id]/page.tsx:2717 TS2589 (tRPC deep-type), (b) apps/web/src/app/tasks/(list)/page.tsx:18 TS2345 (null handling), (c) 5 jsx-a11y/no-redundant-roles errors on `<output role='status'>` in 5 unrelated files (verify-email callback, mfa-verification, oauth-callback stories+impl, SLAIndicator). None are in IFC-031's modified set. ALL IFC-031 code — 17 files across domain/api/web — typechecks clean, lints clean, and compiles successfully (webpack compile succeeded in 67s). 222 workflow-scope tests pass. Phases A-H complete with 9 honest follow-ups tracked in IFC-031-follow-ups.json. User sign-off on the live walkthrough is the last remaining gate before flipping verdict to COMPLETE.

historical_passes.retraction_reason: 7 user-visible defects present despite all 4 static validation gates showing PASS. See plan v2 §1.
